name: Deterra Royalties Limited
analysis: DRR's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.0× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.5400, stop A$4.2125, target A$5.5226 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
